overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a futuristic Japanese-inspired urban district with neon signs, elevated monorail tracks, and mixed traditional-cyberpunk architecture. The character navigates green pedestrian paths, crosses a sunlit intersection, and ascends an outdoor staircase while following a child NPC through moderate crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: green pedestrian path with traditional Japanese gate

agents.ego_description: running forward along the green pedestrian path following a child NPC in a white jacket

notable_agents.action: child in white jacket and blue shorts running ahead of the player character

entered.detail: wooden gate structure with red paper lanterns hanging from the roof
distinctive teal building with circular windows and multiple balconies
futuristic elevated train track structure running overhead through the district
tall digital billboard displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a green pedestrian path in a cyberpunk city district. A traditional Japanese gate with red lanterns stands on the right while a distinctive green circular building rises on the left. The player character runs forward following a child NPC, with an elevated monorail track visible ahead against a clear afternoon sky.

events.description: passing under the elevated monorail track into the shadowed area beneath

agents.ego_description: continuing to run forward beneath the monorail structure, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated track overhead
street vent releasing white steam into the air

segments.scene_description: The character runs beneath the elevated monorail track, entering a semi-covered area with diffused lighting. Steam vents release vapor on the left side of the path. The traditional gate falls behind while the green circular building draws closer on the left, and digital billboards become more prominent on the right.

events.description: approaching the crosswalk and waiting for traffic to clear
crossing the street at the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection toward a red building with neon signage

notable_agents.action: black van driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt
multi-story building with red facade and glowing neon heart signage
tall traffic signal pole at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the monorail, the scene opens into a wide sunlit intersection. The character crosses the striped crosswalk toward a prominent red building with neon signage. A black van drives past on the left as pedestrians scatter across the intersection. The elevated track now curves away to the right.

events.description: beginning to ascend the concrete staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: running up the outdoor concrete stairs toward an upper pedestrian level

notable_agents.action: person in leopard print jacket and blue hair walking down the stairs

entered.detail: wide outdoor stairs with light blue painted side walls leading upward
illuminated vending machine with colorful display at the base of the stairs
wall with purple and pink graffiti art visible from the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a wide outdoor staircase and begins ascending. The stairwell is flanked by light blue walls and graffiti art. A vending machine glows at the base while NPCs sit on an upper landing. The environment becomes more enclosed between the surrounding buildings as the character climbs toward the upper level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk district that transitions from an open pedestrian path into a dense urban intersection and finally up an enclosed staircase. It begins on a green walkway flanked by a traditional Japanese gate and a circular green building, moving forward as the character follows a child toward an elevated monorail track. As the camera passes beneath the track, the lighting becomes diffused and steam vents release vapor, while the open sky is replaced by the looming presence of digital billboards. The scene then opens into a wide, sunlit intersection where the character crosses a striped crosswalk past a black van and toward a prominent red building with neon signage. Finally, the camera turns toward a wide outdoor staircase, ascending past glowing vending machines and graffiti-covered blue walls as the surrounding buildings close in around the character.
